_comment: Stage 10 polygon-rebuild stress test: bevel ALL 12 cube edges with seg=2. Every cube vertex becomes a cube-corner (selCount=3 valence=3); every original cube face has all 4 of its corners replaced by the bevel cap profiles. The original square cube faces become hexagons (4 sides → 4 strips × seg+1 cap-arc samples = ... well, depends on how cap edges merge into the face boundary).
